vocab.meaning: đang vội, không có nhiều thời gian
vocab.example: When I'm pressed for time between back-to-back meetings, a quick glance at my wrist is much faster than fumbling for my phone.

vocab.meaning: diễn ra trơn tru, đúng kế hoạch
vocab.example: Wearing a watch helps my daily routine run like clockwork because I can monitor my progress at every step.

vocab.meaning: một cuộc chạy đua với thời gian
vocab.example: During exams, it's literally a race against time, so having a watch is absolutely vital to pace myself correctly.

vocab.meaning: quên mất thời gian, không để ý giờ giấc
vocab.example: It's so easy to lose track of time when you're engrossed in work, but a watch keeps you grounded in reality.
Investing in a good watch is beneficial in the long run as it fosters a much more disciplined lifestyle.
I don't just wear a watch to kill time; I use it to ensure that every minute of my day is spent productively.
It actually saves time to check your wrist rather than getting distracted by endless notifications on a smartphone.
Traditional watches have stood the test of time as a symbol of elegance, even in this high-tech digital era.
Some sophisticated mechanical watches were truly ahead of their time when they were first engineered centuries ago.
Having a watch prevents me from finishing my tasks at the eleventh hour because I can manage my countdown effectively.
